trigger.description: User invoked --redaction with a value that is not one of the canonical 5 levels (none|minimal|standard|strict|paranoid). The surface returns an ee.error.v2 envelope with details.acceptedValues enumerating the canonical levels.

notes: Error envelope (not success.degraded[]); CLI exit code 1 (usage error). error.details.acceptedValues MUST list the 5 canonical levels in canonical order so programmatic recovery is trivial.
